message:
Executor test infrastructure and fixes (#5684)

## Summary

This PR builds on the executor branch with additional fixes and test
infrastructure:

1. **Move existing tests to legacy directory** - Renamed `test/` to
`test-legacy/` to prepare for new executor-specific tests

2. **Instantiate implicit sink before spawning** - Fixed a crash when
using `--color=always` by ensuring the implicit sink is instantiated
before operator spawning

3. **Do not swallow warnings** - Updated the test runner to properly
display warnings instead of suppressing them

4. **Document state keeping best practice** - Added documentation for
state-keeping patterns in executor implementations

5. **Fix new JSON printer** - Simplified the JSON format implementation
using the `Describer` abstraction

6. **Nix build fixes**:
   - Updated Nix build to use `test-legacy` directory
   - Made `liburing` Linux-only to fix Darwin builds
   - Fixed indentation in `propagatedBuildInputs`

## Test plan

- [x] Rebase onto latest `topic/executor`
- [ ] CI passes, including `Nix / tenzir-static-arm64-darwin`
- [ ] Run executor tests with `uvx tenzir-test --root test-legacy`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

@@ -914,10 +914,21 @@ else ()
     string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -mavx2")
   endif ()
   message(STATUS "Folly CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS: ${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS}")
-  # Force folly to build as static library to avoid exception handling issues
-  # across shared library boundaries.
+  # Force folly to build as a static library for two reasons:
+  # 1. On macOS, std::current_exception() returns nullptr in coroutine
+  #    unhandled_exception() handlers when folly crosses shared library
+  #    boundaries.
+  # 2. On Linux aarch64, folly's CMake has duplicate aor (Arm Optimized
+  #    Routines) object targets that cause multiple definition errors when
+  #    building as a shared library.
   set(_saved_build_shared_libs "${BUILD_SHARED_LIBS}")
   set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF)
+  # When the main build uses shared libraries, folly must be compiled with
+  # -fPIC even though it's built as a static library, because it will be
+  # linked into a shared library.
+  if (_saved_build_shared_libs)
+    set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
+  endif ()
   add_subdirectory(libtenzir/aux/folly SYSTEM)
   set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS "${_saved_build_shared_libs}")
   set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${_saved_cxx_flags}")

 # Helper function to build tenzir-test command invocations
 function (tenzir_build_test_command out_var)
-  cmake_parse_arguments(ARG "" "TEST_ROOT" "EXTRA_ENV;EXTRA_ARGS;SELECTION"
+  cmake_parse_arguments(ARG "" "TEST_ROOT;WORKING_DIR" "EXTRA_ENV;EXTRA_ARGS;SELECTION"
                         ${ARGN})
 
+  # Default working directory to test/ if not specified
+  if (NOT ARG_WORKING_DIR)
+    set(ARG_WORKING_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test")
+  endif ()
+
   set(cmd
       "${CMAKE_COMMAND}"
       "-E"
       "chdir"
-      "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
+      "${ARG_WORKING_DIR}"
       "${CMAKE_COMMAND}"
       "-E"
       "env"
@@ -238,7 +243,7 @@ function (tenzir_build_test_command out_var)
   else ()
     # Default: all projects (test root + contrib plugins)
     list(APPEND cmd "--all-projects")
-    list(APPEND selection "--root" "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test")
+    list(APPEND selection "--root" "${ARG_WORKING_DIR}")
 
     # Add contrib/tenzir-plugins/*/test directories if they exist
     if (EXISTS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/contrib/tenzir-plugins")

+# Legacy tests (test-legacy/)
+set(_legacy_tests_root "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test-legacy/tests")
+if (EXISTS "${_legacy_tests_root}")
+  file(GLOB _legacy_test_dirs RELATIVE "${_legacy_tests_root}"
+       "${_legacy_tests_root}/[^_]*")
+  foreach (dir IN LISTS _legacy_test_dirs)
+    if (NOT IS_DIRECTORY "${_legacy_tests_root}/${dir}" OR "${dir}" MATCHES "^inputs/?$")
+      continue()
+    endif ()
+    tenzir_build_test_command(_test_cmd TEST_ROOT "${_legacy_tests_root}/${dir}/"
+                              WORKING_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test-legacy")
+    add_test(NAME "tenzir-legacy/${dir}" COMMAND ${_test_cmd})
+    set_tests_properties("tenzir-legacy/${dir}"
+      PROPERTIES
+        WORKING_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test-legacy"
+        FIXTURES_REQUIRED "tenzir_integration_test_fixture"
+        LABELS "integration;legacy"
+        RUN_SERIAL TRUE)
+  endforeach ()
+endif ()
+
+# Neo tests (test/)
+set(_neo_tests_root "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test/tests")
+if (EXISTS "${_neo_tests_root}")
+  file(GLOB _neo_test_dirs RELATIVE "${_neo_tests_root}"
+       "${_neo_tests_root}/[^_]*")
+  foreach (dir IN LISTS _neo_test_dirs)
+    if (NOT IS_DIRECTORY "${_neo_tests_root}/${dir}" OR "${dir}" MATCHES "^inputs/?$")
+      continue()
+    endif ()
+    tenzir_build_test_command(_test_cmd TEST_ROOT "${_neo_tests_root}/${dir}/"
+                              WORKING_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test")
+    add_test(NAME "tenzir/${dir}" COMMAND ${_test_cmd})
+    set_tests_properties("tenzir/${dir}"
+      PROPERTIES
+        WORKING_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
+        FIXTURES_REQUIRED "tenzir_integration_test_fixture"
+        LABELS "integration;neo"
+        RUN_SERIAL TRUE)
+  endforeach ()
 endif ()
-foreach (dir IN LISTS _integration_test_dirs)
-  if (NOT IS_DIRECTORY "${_integration_tests_root}/${dir}")
-    continue()
-  endif ()
-  if ("${dir}" MATCHES "^inputs/?$")
-    continue()
-  endif ()
-  tenzir_build_test_command(_test_cmd TEST_ROOT
-                            "${_integration_tests_root}/${dir}/")
-  add_test(NAME "tenzir/${dir}" COMMAND ${_test_cmd})
-  set_tests_properties(

-               "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
-               FIXTURES_REQUIRED

-               LABELS
-               integration
-               RUN_SERIAL
-               TRUE)
-endforeach ()
 
+# Separate make targets for legacy and neo tests
+add_custom_target(integration-legacy DEPENDS tenzir)
+tenzir_build_test_command(_legacy_cmd EXTRA_ARGS "--jobs" "4" "--summary"
+                          WORKING_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test-legacy")
+add_custom_command(TARGET integration-legacy POST_BUILD
+  COMMAND ${_legacy_cmd}
+  USES_TERMINAL VERBATIM)
+
+add_custom_target(integration-neo DEPENDS tenzir)
+tenzir_build_test_command(_neo_cmd EXTRA_ARGS "--jobs" "4" "--summary"
+                          WORKING_DIR "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test")
+add_custom_command(TARGET integration-neo POST_BUILD
+  COMMAND ${_neo_cmd}
+  USES_TERMINAL VERBATIM)
+
+# Combined target that runs all tests
 add_custom_target(integration-tests DEPENDS tenzir)
-tenzir_build_test_command(_integration_tests_cmd EXTRA_ARGS "--jobs" "4"
-                          "--summary")

   TARGET integration-tests
   POST_BUILD
-  COMMAND ${_integration_tests_cmd}
+  COMMAND ${_legacy_cmd}
+  COMMAND ${_neo_cmd}
   USES_TERMINAL VERBATIM)
 
 add_custom_target(integration)
 add_dependencies(integration integration-tests)

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+"""Project-specific runner registrations for Tenzir integration tests."""
+
+from .ast_runner import AstRunner  # noqa: F401
+from .finalize_runner import FinalizeRunner  # noqa: F401
+from .instantiation_runner import InstantiationRunner  # noqa: F401
+from .ir_runner import IrRunner  # noqa: F401
+from .lexer_runner import LexerRunner  # noqa: F401
+from .multi_runner import MultiRunner  # noqa: F401
+from .opt_runner import OptRunner  # noqa: F401
+from .oldir_runner import OldIrRunner  # noqa: F401
+
+__all__ = [
+    "AstRunner",
+    "FinalizeRunner",
+    "InstantiationRunner",
+    "IrRunner",
+    "LexerRunner",
+    "MultiRunner",
+    "OptRunner",
+    "OldIrRunner",
+]
